!INIT_MEM_LOCK_PROTOCOL.BIOMETRIC_LOCK: TRUE (Replicating every pixel of the anitomalogical topgraphy perfectly)
!INIT_MEM_LOCK_PROTOCOL.IDENTITY_DRIFT_CONTROL: MAXIMUM_LOCK (Inhibit automatic AI skin-smoothing filters, eliminate facial balancing or symmetry modifications, bypass default commercial touch-up layers. Enforce expression=visceral reaction to an unpleasant taste, opening mouth revealing tongue slathered in a semi-translucent, milky viscous gel--tongue rolls, winces)

!ENV_ATMOSPHERICS.GLASS_SURFACE_METRICS: dust particles catching direct light illumination

COMPOSITION_DEPTH.FOREGROUND: shallow depth of field to create a film like dramatic style
COMPOSITION_DEPTH.MIDGROUND: she is posing for the camera
COMPOSITION_DEPTH.BACKGROUND: spolight lit, clean mirrored walls, floor and ceiling showing high reflection

!EXEC_BIO_DERMAL_MAP.SKIN_TOPOGRAPHY_LOGIC: unfiltered human skin texture showing hyper realistic details
!EXEC_BIO_DERMAL_MAP.SURFACE_MICRO_ELEMENTS: true visible dermal pores, fine goosebumps on arms, micro sweat beads catching specular highlights, natural skin folds, raw un-airbrused complexion
!EXEC_BIO_DERMAL_MAP.REFLECTANCE_MAP: high specular glisten on damp skin tissue interacting directly with the harsh flash rays
!EXEC_BIO_DERMAL_MAP.EXPRESSION: cool, detached, neutral expression; jaw slightly relaxed, lips subtly parted, gaze fixed steadily on camera lens
!EXEC_BIO_DERMAL_MAP.HAIR: messy, loose uncombed updo with stray hair strands falling naturally across cheeks and neck

!ENV_PHOTOMETRY.SHADOW_PROFILE: razor-sharp, jet-black drop shadows directly behind physical subject contours with zero penumbra blending

!EXEC_MATERIAL_PHYSICS.TEXTILE_SURFACE_SHEEN: anisotropic silk reflection mapping direct flash glare along tight fabric folds and fine micro-wrinkles

REQUIREMENT_CHECKS.FOCUS_LOCK: maximum micro-contrast focus locked onto cloth weave and skin grain
